title: Rabbit Season
description: Adds rabbits to some additional biomes to make finding them easier and changes the bundle recipe back to using rabbit hide.
body:
Ever want to get a bundle but you don't like that rabbits aren't all that common and you also don't like Mojang's fix by using leather instead of rabbit hide?? Well, here is the perfect datapack for you!

The goal of the datapack is to provide players that want to get a bundle but using rabbit hide instead of leather. You'll find rabbits in the forests, plains, savannas, and swamps; they will be as common as sheep! You'll also rarely find them in frozen oceans too as slight additional parity to bedrock. The datapack changes the recipe of the bundle to be one rabbit hide and one string to keep bundles as an early game item while also giving rabbit hide a second use.
